overall_notes: Archive Northern Ireland Ltd has made a credible start to climate disclosure for a small organisation, providing quantified Scope 1, 2 and partial Scope 3 data in its second year of quantitative reporting. However, the disclosure is materially limited by the complete absence of third-party assurance, only aspirational SBTi engagement, and a net zero target that currently lacks interim milestones or a transition pathway. Evidence quality is consistent across dimensions but uniformly at an early-stage maturity level.

scores.dimension_name: Net Zero commitment and transition plan
scores.evidence_quote: The Board has approved a target of Net Zero greenhouse gas emissions by 2050. Our baseline year is 2022 and we will publish progress against this target annually.
scores.scoring_rationale: A specific net zero target year (2050) is stated with board approval and a baseline year, qualifying for score 2. However, no interim milestones currently exist and no named decarbonisation pathway is described, precluding a score of 3.

scores.evidence_quote: Scope 1 (gas, fleet, refrigerants) 412 [tCO2e]; Scope 2 (electricity, location-based) 286 [tCO2e]; Total Scope 1 & 2 698
scores.scoring_rationale: Quantified Scope 1 and Scope 2 (location-based) figures are disclosed in absolute tCO₂e, meeting the score 2 threshold. A score of 3 is not awarded because there is no market-based Scope 2 figure, no year-on-year emissions comparison (only electricity consumption is compared), and no third-party assurance.

scores.evidence_quote: Scope 3 (partial — see below) 184 [tCO2e]. We have included business travel and waste generated in operations.
scores.scoring_rationale: At least one material Scope 3 category is quantified (184 tCO₂e covering business travel and waste), satisfying the score 2 criterion. A score of 3 is not warranted as coverage is explicitly partial, no methodology note is provided, and there is no third-party assurance.

scores.evidence_quote: We have not yet engaged an external assurance provider but will keep this under review as our reporting matures.
scores.scoring_rationale: The document explicitly states that no external assurance provider has been engaged. Internal review by the Finance Director and Audit Committee does not constitute third-party verification, so a score of 0 is appropriate.

scores.evidence_quote: We have reviewed the Science Based Targets initiative (SBTi) framework and intend to seek validation of our targets in due course.
scores.scoring_rationale: SBTi is explicitly referenced and validation is expressed as an intention, but no commitment letter has been signed and no submission has been made, placing this firmly at score 1 (aspiration only).
